description: Akshaya is the Government of Kerala's e-service network with thousands of centres in every panchayat and municipality. If you need in-person help filling the KEAM application form, paying the fee, or uploading documents, an Akshaya Centre is the closest, low-cost option in the state.

representative_centres.note: City centre near the Secretariat, helpful for first-time applicants from southern Kerala.
Dense Akshaya network across Ernakulam district; useful for applicants in central Kerala.
Several Akshaya centres around Kozhikode city; widely used by Calicut-area applicants.
Akshaya centres serve North Kerala applicants for KEAM and other CEE applications.
Convenient for candidates in central Kerala and around the cultural-capital region.
